heroImageAlt: Communion materials prepared for a chaplaincy support session
mainIntro1: Our hospice welcomes patients and families of all faiths and beliefs. As part of our holistic person-centred approach, we offer spiritual and chaplaincy support as and when individuals request it.
mainIntro2: Our volunteer chaplaincy team hold monthly communion services for those who choose to participate, and we source alternative faith support for individuals on request.

sectionImage1.alt: Communion materials prepared for a chaplaincy support session

supportList.text: Open to patients and families of all faiths and beliefs
Monthly communion services led by our volunteer chaplaincy team
Alternative faith support sourced on request

referralIntro: For more information or to enquire about our spiritual support services please complete the
referralOutro: and a member of our team will be in touch.
sideFormHint: Enquire about spiritual and chaplaincy support.
